question: Use the nemo-mbridge-perf-expert-parallel-overlap skill. For a Megatron Bridge MoE model with EP>1, give the exact plain EP-overlap config, the flex-dispatcher activation call for DeepEP/HybridEP, and the main validation constraints before enabling delayed wgrad. Keep the answer to at most five bullets.
ground_truth: The answer should use the expert-parallel overlap skill. It should enable cfg.comm_overlap.overlap_moe_expert_parallel_comm=True, start with cfg.comm_overlap.delay_wgrad_compute=False for correctness-first bring-up, set cfg.model.moe_shared_expert_overlap=False, require num_moe_experts>1, and use moe_token_dispatcher_type="alltoall" or "flex". For flex dispatch it should call apply_flex_dispatcher_backend(cfg.model, moe_flex_dispatcher_backend="deepep" or "hybridep") rather than setting only the backend string. It should state that PP>1 requires virtual_pipeline_model_parallel_size, full recompute must be off, delayed wgrad requires overlap_moe_expert_parallel_comm, and delayed wgrad with overlap_grad_reduce or gradient_accumulation_fusion needs TE>=2.7.0.
expected_behavior: Read the nemo-mbridge-perf-expert-parallel-overlap skill before answering.
Identify expert-parallel communication overlap as the requested feature.
List overlap_moe_expert_parallel_comm, delay_wgrad_compute, and moe_shared_expert_overlap settings.
Use apply_flex_dispatcher_backend for DeepEP or HybridEP activation.
Mention PP/VPP, full recompute, and delayed-wgrad prerequisite constraints.
Recommend validating logs/tests and measuring against a baseline.
